channel.title: Linkedin on Imlauer
channel.description: Recent content in Linkedin on Imlauer

item.title: Sabiduría de George Hotz
item.description:
Partes del Linkedin.

https://www.linkedin.com/comm/feed/update/activity:7442111103658229760?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_notification_digest_01%3BE%2FMYw%2BvSTTaKH3gwPpiCKQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQEi3wpUlWi58Q&midSig=0nIUnyYRSafYc1&trk=eml-email_notification_digest_01-hero_notification_cta-0-SHARED_BY_YOUR_NETWORK&trkEmail=eml-email_notification_digest_01-hero_notification_cta-0-SHARED_BY_YOUR_NETWORK-null-rn6k97~mn501kfw~r1-null-null-u4zcJf0tR1yNurRtwrriIQ%3D%3D&eid=rn6k97-mn501kfw-r1&otpToken=MTMwMzE5ZTExNzJjY2RjNWI0MjkwZmViNDExOWUzYjc4N2NlZDE0MzliYWI4NzYzN2JjNjAxNjk0YTVmNWFmM2YwZDFkN2U0MThlMmUzZDI3YjkyZWZiMDMwYWJhZDNmODUwMDBhNGEzNWFiYjY4ZTgwNWJmYzEzNmIsMSwx

https://www.linkedin.com/in/george-hotz-b3866476/recent-activity/comments/

https://www.linkedin.com/in/george-hotz-b3866476/recent-activity/all/

https://www.linkedin.com/in/george-hotz-b3866476/recent-activity/reactions/

https://www.linkedin.com/in/george-hotz-b3866476/recent-activity/images/

Good leadership is setting up a zero tolerance policy for office politics. If your office has politics, your leadership has failed.

No wonder Anthropic doesn’t want you using opencode, the Claude Code source leaked and it’s full of spyware.

NVIDIA es una empresa de software.

USA nacionalizó NVIDIA pusieron mucho control sobre las GPUs es nacionalismo con características capitalistas.

Los Microcontroladores fueron commodizados, todas las cafeteras que tienen un pequeño display tiene un microcontrolador y nadie está pagando 90% margin por eso, no pagan nada.
